title: Pulsar Supertanker
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Pulsar}}
'''Pulsar Supertanker''' was a company allied with the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. It was not as consumed with the bottom line as the rest of the Federation, which led to its expulsion from the organization. It was a young [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray's]] testimony to the [[Trade Federation Directorate]] against the company that first brought him to the attention of [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]].
